title: stachys japonica var. villosa
intro: Stachys japonica var. villosa, also known as Japanese Betony, is a plant species in the mint family Lamiaceae, characterized by its hairy leaves and purple flowers. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Japanese Betony include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of menopausal hot flashes. Japanese Betony can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote relaxation and reduce inflammation.
